target: source condition, tooth safety, visible wear, and handling hazards documented
action: Reject blade or add guarding if hazards found

target: repeatable gentle S-curve held without unsafe motion or visible damage
action: Revise blade choice or handling technique if unsafe

target: stable tone started and stopped safely
action: Revise bow/rosin/contact setup if tone is unstable

target: transient response and damping without uncontrolled blade movement
action: Revise striker or abandon struck mode if uncontrolled

target: measured pitch recorded only after setup/tool documented
method: tuner or recording, logged with setup notes

target: edge protection, posture, storage, transport addressed before any public guidance
action: Block public build guidance until resolved
